category_sources: source_facts.description says thriftgo is a Go implementation of the Thrift compiler with plugin mechanism.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/cloudwego/thriftgo uses the heading "Thriftgo".
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README provides installation, usage, and plugin guidance; repository contains an official docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/cloudwego/thriftgo; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Thrift compiler in Go; source_facts.executables lists thriftgo CLI.
